name: elegy-accounts
description: Generic local account authentication, encrypted credential storage, scoped broker execution, grants, and revocation for people and agents.

interface.longDescription: Discover, connect, select, review, and revoke local accounts while agents receive only scoped, auditable access grants.
defaultPrompt: Connect the account I need with minimum access.
Show my connected accounts and agent access.
Revoke account access I no longer need.
